who: law firm billing administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For law firm billing administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual invoice creation causes delays in billing and cash flow gaps. We simplify invoice formatting instead of manual invoice creation using word processors and spreadsheets.
problem: Manual invoice creation from legal documents is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm billing administrators with demo video
Community forums where billing administrators share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based invoice generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
